prompt: Create a coherent 4x4 raster south-facing cast sequence for Thresh with 16 ordered poses, a spectral chain-and-lantern recall, compact pixel-art silhouette, magenta chroma-key background and no bomb, leaving generous cell padding.

frames.order: frame-00..frame-15; settle, lantern raise, chain gather, spectral ring, pulse, release and return

validation.borderIssue: Frames 03, 06, 07, 08, 09, 12 and 13 contain alpha above the audit threshold on a cell edge; this propagates to both atlases.
validation.cyanOrMagentaSpill: no visible magenta halo; residual magenta-like pixels are sub-visible palette colors
validation.decision: Discarded because border isolation was not engine-safe; no destructive cleanup was applied.

grok.summary: Confirmed structure and timing but found border-touching alpha on seven frames; declined unsafe cleanup.

origin: Internal candidate generated for the Bomba PvP animation lab; no external pack or downloaded asset.
license: Internal project source; discarded candidate; not approved for final Champion distribution.
